## Executive Summary
Beyond Meat, Inc. filing highlights standardized metrics Management adopted a neutral tone. Revenue at $58.2M for 2026-03-28; Net income reported at $-28.5M; Net margin tracked at -48.9% based on available XBRL data.

## Financials
- Revenue: $58.2M vs. $68.7M – Reported for 2026-03-28.
- Net Income: $-28.5M vs. $-61.1M – Latest standardized value for 2026-03-28.
- Net Margin: -48.9% vs. -88.9% – Derived from aligned revenue and income figures.
- Profitability: Net margin approximately -48.9% based on standardized data.
- Cash flow: Cash flow details were not disclosed in the targeted excerpts; monitor future filings for updates.
- Balance sheet: Revenue scale of $58.2M provides a proxy for balance sheet size.

## Management Commentary

- Capital allocation: Capital allocation priorities reflected in the financial statements. Review cash flow statement for deployment details.
